info.name: DQMS API Testing
info.description: Postman collection for testing DQMS (Data Quality Management System) API endpoints

request.description: Health check endpoint to verify server and database connectivity
Initiates a new chat session for a problem. Returns session_id, problem_id and initial AI response.

exec: console.warn('No session_id found. Run "Chat - Start Session" first.');
console.warn('No problem_id found. Run "Chat - Start Session" first.');

request.description: Sends a user's solution for analysis. Message type should be 'user_solution'.

exec: console.warn('No session_id found. Run "Chat - Start Session" first.');

request.description: Sends a response to follow-up questions. Message type should be 'response'.
Structures a problem description into a standardized format. Returns structured_problem.
Structures a solution description into a standardized format. Returns structured_solution.
Validates a solution against the problem using evaluateSolution. Returns evaluation_result.
Re-validates a solution with additional clarifying notes. Returns updated evaluation_result.
Generates clarifying notes from Q&A pairs. Questions and answers arrays must have same length. Returns clarifying_notes.

exec: console.warn('No session_id found. Run "Chat - Start Session" first.');
console.warn('No problem_id found. Run "Chat - Start Session" first.');

request.description: Saves a complete solution with structured problem and solution, optional clarifying notes. Updates solution with enhancements, saves to DB, finds root cause, generates summary. Returns solution_id, saved_at, root_cause, solution_summary.

exec: console.warn('No session_id found. Run "Chat - Start Session" first.');

request.description: Saves a complete session with problem description, root cause analysis, and solution details. Creates solution entry and updates session status to 'solution_saved'. Returns solution_id and saved_at.

variable.description: Base URL for the DQMS API server
Solution ID from solutions/save or session/save endpoint
